name: refreshUserEntitlementsInMixpanel-payload-gotcha
hook: Payload runtime cannot be called from client bundle
body: refreshUserEntitlementsInMixpanel() in system-events-subscriber.ts runs in the browser bundle because initAnalyticsSubscriber() is called from AnalyticsProvider mount. Calling Payload directly (importing from @/server/payload) drags grpc/fs/tls into the client bundle and breaks the build. Always use /api/users/me for user data in analytics subscriber context.
why: This is a non-obvious build trap that only manifests at build time — a coding agent or new developer would not infer this from reading the code.
